app_tagline: Fair Pay. Real Impact. Real Change.
hero_desc: A community-driven platform ensuring transparent, fair labour pricing — empowering workers, organizations, and policymakers with real-time data and tools.
metrics_desc: Real-time data showing the community's reach and economic impact.
stories_desc: Real people, real change. How fair labour pricing transformed lives.
personas_desc: Tap a persona to explore their journey with the platform.
calculator_desc: Select your industry, state, and work parameters to get a fair wage recommendation.
pricing_desc: Calculate fair wages based on skill level, region cost index, and industry overhead.
